📖 Read More About Seven Wonders TV

Seven Wonders TV

Welcome to Seven Wonders TV – Your 24×7 Hindu Devotional TV Channel

Experience spirituality anytime, anywhere with Seven Wonders TV, a dedicated Hindu devotional television channel bringing you Live Darshan, Bhajans, Aartis, Spiritual Discourses, Temple Festivals, Katha, Pravachan and devotional programs throughout the day.

Our mission is to spread the timeless values of Sanatan Dharma and connect devotees across the world through high-quality devotional content available online 24 hours a day.

Watch Seven Wonders TV Live

Watch our live devotional television channel directly from your browser without any subscription.

  • Live Darshan
  • Daily Aarti
  • Devotional Bhajans
  • Katha & Pravachan
  • Temple Festivals
  • Spiritual Programs
  • Hindu Religious Events
  • Special Festival Broadcasts

Whether you are at home or travelling, Seven Wonders TV keeps you connected with faith, devotion and spirituality.

Why Choose Seven Wonders TV?

  • 24×7 Live Streaming
  • High Quality HD Video
  • Free Online Viewing
  • Dedicated Hindu Spiritual Programming
  • Mobile, Tablet, Smart TV & Desktop Compatible
  • Daily Devotional Programs
  • Festival Special Broadcasts

Our Vision

Seven Wonders TV promotes Indian culture, spirituality and the teachings of Sanatan Dharma by delivering authentic devotional content to viewers worldwide.

Featured Programs

  • Morning Aarti
  • Live Temple Darshan
  • Hanuman Chalisa
  • Shiv Bhajans
  • Krishna Bhajans
  • Ram Katha
  • Bhagavad Gita Discourses
  • Spiritual Talks
  • Festival Specials
  • Devotional Music

Watch From Anywhere

Seven Wonders TV can be watched online from India, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Australia, the Middle East, Europe and anywhere with an internet connection.

Stay Connected

Follow Seven Wonders TV for the latest devotional programs, live events, temple festivals and spiritual broadcasts.

Visit us regularly to experience uninterrupted spiritual content and stay connected with your faith.

Contact

Website: www.sevenwonderstv.com

Thank you for visiting Seven Wonders TV. May peace, devotion and divine blessings always remain with you.

✦ ✦ ✦
ॐ सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः। सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः॥
सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु। मा कश्चिद् दुःख भाग्भवेत्॥
May all beings be happy • May all be free from illness • May all see what is auspicious • May no one suffer.
✦ ✦ ✦
ॐ

Our Deities

श्री गणेश
भगवान शिव
श्री विष्णु
माँ लक्ष्मी
श्री हनुमान
श्री कृष्ण
श्री राम
माँ दुर्गा
भगवान सूर्य

ॐ सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः। सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः॥
सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु। मा कश्चिद् दुःख भाग्भवेत्॥
May all beings be happy • May all be free from illness • May all see what is auspicious • May no one suffer.

Our Programs

🪔

Shubh Prabhat Aarti

Begin your day with divine blessings. Morning aarti, Vishnu Sahastranaam & Shiv Chalisa.

⏰ Daily 6:00 AM
📖

Shrimad Bhagwat Katha

Pravachan by revered saints on the eternal wisdom of Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran.

⏰ Daily 10:00 AM
🎵

Bhajan Sandhya

Soul-stirring devotional bhajans and kirtans by celebrated artists and saints.

⏰ Daily 6:00 PM
🏹

Ramayan Paath

The sacred story of Maryada Purushottam Shri Ram narrated daily for divine grace.

⏰ Daily 3:00 PM
🔱

Shiv Mahapuran

Stories and teachings from Shiva Purana — Om Namah Shivaya, the eternal mantra.

⏰ Mon & Thu 7:00 PM
⚡

Hanuman Chalisa Paath

Group recitation of Shri Hanuman Chalisa with commentary and devotional singing.

⏰ Daily 8:30 PM
ॐ
